full_text:
Qin Shao (Bonan) 秦召 (伯南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Shao (秦召), styledBonan (伯南). Saved Cao Cao’s life at the cost of his own, his son was adopted by Cao Cao. Qin Shao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Qin Shao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
